Title: Governance & Drift Remediation
Description: IaC reconciliation, deprecated artifact cleanup, cost visibility. Maps to R2, R10, R13, N1, N2, N6.
Acceptance Criteria: All live Azure resources tracked in IaC or registered as justified exceptions; cost visibility active; deprecated configs archived

Title: Production Readiness & Resilience
Description: Backup/restore, environment parity, SLOs, go-live gate. Maps to R1, R6, R7, R12, N8, P1-P3, P9.
Acceptance Criteria: Staging deployed; backup restore tested; SLOs defined; single go-live gate

Title: Security & Network Hardening
Description: Identity (Entra OIDC + MFA), private endpoints, NSGs, CodeQL. Maps to R3, R4, R9, N3, N4, N7, P5, P8.
Acceptance Criteria: MFA enforced; Odoo SSO via Entra; private endpoints for PG + KV; CodeQL active

Title: Observability & Operations
Description: Alert routing verification, operational response ownership, runbooks. Maps to R7, R12.
Acceptance Criteria: Alert routing verified; runbooks for top 5 failure scenarios

Title: AI Platform Readiness
Description: KB seeding, eval gate, prompt injection, API key migration. Maps to R5, R11, R14, N5, P4, P6, P7.
Acceptance Criteria: KB indexed; eval gate active; prompt injection blocked; API key in Key Vault

Title: Platform Productization & Scale
Description: Multi-region, SaaS isolation, Defender, FinOps, DORA. Maps to L1-L6.
Acceptance Criteria: Deferred until single-tenant production is stable

Title: Reconcile IaC with Live Azure State
Description: N1/R2: 20+ portal-deployed resources not tracked in Bicep. Primary governance risk.
Acceptance Criteria: az deployment what-if shows zero drift; all resources in Bicep or registered exceptions

Title: Enable Azure Cost Management
Description: N2/R10: No visibility into monthly Azure spend across 22 ACA apps + AI services.
Acceptance Criteria: Cost export active; $500/month budget alert configured

Title: Archive Deprecated Infrastructure Configs
Description: N6/R13: Repo contains DigitalOcean, Supabase, Mailgun configs that confuse automation.
Acceptance Criteria: infra/ contains only active Azure configs

Title: Set PostgreSQL Backup Retention in Bicep
Description: N8/R6: Backup policy planned but not in IaC.
Acceptance Criteria: backupRetentionDays: 30 in Bicep; deployed and verified

Title: Deploy Staging Environment
Description: P1/R1: All workloads named *-dev with no staging/prod distinction.
Acceptance Criteria: Staging ACA + PG running; health check green

Title: Test Backup Restore
Description: P3/R6: Untested backups are not backups. RTO is unknown.
Acceptance Criteria: Restore to test_restore_* DB; row count match; RTO measured

Title: Consolidate Go-Live Checklist
Description: P2/R7: 5 versions of go-live checklists create confusion at cutover.
Acceptance Criteria: Single GO_LIVE_GATE.md; superseded checklists archived

Title: Define Production SLOs
Description: P9: No targets means no measurement.
Acceptance Criteria: SLO doc with uptime 99.5% and p95 latency < 3s; mapped to alert rules

Title: Solo Operator Mitigation
Description: R12: Bus factor = 1. No peer review, no on-call rotation.
Acceptance Criteria: Runbooks for top 5 failure scenarios; escalation path documented

Title: Enable Entra Conditional Access + MFA
Description: N4/R3: Admin access to Azure/Odoo has no MFA enforcement.
Acceptance Criteria: CA policy deployed; sign-in log showing MFA challenge

Title: Activate Entra OIDC for Odoo
Description: P5/R3: Odoo uses basic login; no SSO, no MFA for end users.
Acceptance Criteria: Odoo login via Entra redirect; sign-in log proof

Title: Formalize NSG Rules in Bicep
Description: N3/R4: VNet deployed but NSG rules unknown/untracked.
Acceptance Criteria: NSG rules in Bicep; az deployment what-if clean

Title: Deploy Private Endpoints for PG + KV
Description: P8/R4: Database and secrets accessible on public network.
Acceptance Criteria: KV defaultAction=Deny; PE for KV; PG PE validated

Title: Enable CodeQL via GitHub Actions
Description: N7/R9: No static security analysis beyond linting.
Acceptance Criteria: CodeQL workflow running; first scan results

Title: Verify Production Alert Routing and Response Ownership
Description: 4 alert rules deployed but routing and response ownership unverified.
Acceptance Criteria: Action group has valid targets; test alert received; response matrix documented

Title: Operational Runbooks
Description: No documented incident response for common failure scenarios.
Acceptance Criteria: 5 runbooks covering ACA restart loop / PG exhaustion / AFD failure / AI degradation / TLS expiry

Title: Seed Knowledge Base Index
Description: N5/R5: RAG copilot returns empty results without indexed data.
Acceptance Criteria: 7000+ chunks indexed; 3 test queries return relevant results

Title: Integrate Eval Gate in CI/CD
Description: P4/R5: AI copilot releases bypass quality validation.
Acceptance Criteria: Eval_Gate stage passes/fails on 20+ test cases

Title: Migrate AI API Key to Key Vault
Description: P6/R11: API key in Odoo ir.config_parameter instead of Key Vault.
Acceptance Criteria: FOUNDRY_API_KEY sourced from KV; copilot functional

Title: Add Prompt Injection Detection
Description: P7/R14: User input goes raw to LLM with no content filtering.
Acceptance Criteria: Detector in controller; malicious prompts blocked

Title: Multi-Region Deployment
Description: L1: Single-region = single point of failure.
Acceptance Criteria: Secondary region deployed; failover test passed

Title: Implement Tenant Isolation
Description: L2: SaaS requires data boundary enforcement.
Acceptance Criteria: Tenant context middleware; cross-tenant leakage test

Title: Enable Defender for Cloud
Description: L3: Advanced threat detection.
Acceptance Criteria: Defender enabled; alerts integrated

Title: Azure Savings Plans / Reservations
Description: L4: Cost optimization at scale.
Acceptance Criteria: Reservation coverage report; 20-40% savings

Title: DORA Metrics Collection
Description: L5: Quantify delivery performance.
Acceptance Criteria: DORA dashboard with baseline metrics

Title: Internal Developer Platform
Description: L6: Self-service for team growth.
Acceptance Criteria: Service catalog + provisioning CLI

Acceptance Criteria: Spreadsheet or YAML mapping all 52 resources to Bicep module or 'untracked' status
